# Do Stuff & Have Fun

Do Stuff & Have Fun is an 11-game browser arcade led by a 3D spotlight game. The site has one YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/@EPICMAPPING023

Main page:
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/

Games:
- Spotlight Dash 3D: Race through a dark stage while a giant spotlight follows you.
- Classic Snake: Eat snacks, grow longer, and do not crash into yourself.
- Solo Pong: Keep the ball alive with one paddle and chase a high score.
- Falling Blocks: Drop, rotate, and clear rows in a Tetris-style puzzle.
- Two Player Pong: A local multiplayer Pong match for two people.
- Brick Breaker: Bounce the ball and smash every brick.
- Asteroid Drift: Pilot through drifting rocks and stay alive.
- Invader Blast: Slide, shoot, and knock down the invader row.
- Maze Run: Reach the exit without touching walls.
- Stack Jump: Jump over blocks and keep running.
- Target Pop: Click targets before the timer runs out.
